name: drafting-loop
description: Universal work orchestration for all kinds of knowledge work

interface.shortDescription: Universal work orchestration for all knowledge work
interface.longDescription: A single orchestration layer for crafting, composing, evaluating, investigating, and creating work from intent through evidence-based acceptance.
defaultPrompt: Draft and deliver this work end-to-end from requirements to verified delivery
Review this completed work and decide whether it is ready to ship
Investigate this question and produce a research report
